final_output.final_deliverable:
## 1) Primary programming language used
**Python** (top/primary language)

**Evidence (verbatim quote):** The repository’s “Languages” section lists (in order) **“Python 62.1%”** followed by other languages, indicating Python is the primary language. From the repo page (https://github.com/python/cpython):
- “Languages
Python
62.1%
C
35.9%
C++
0.7%
M4
0.4%
HTML
0.3%
JavaScript
0.1%
Other
0.5%” (https://github.com/python/cpython)

## 2) Number of stars (approximate)
**~71.8k stars**

**Evidence (verbatim quote):** From the repository header/metadata on GitHub (https://github.com/python/cpython):
- “Star
71.8k” (https://github.com/python/cpython)
- “71.8k
stars” (https://github.com/python/cpython)

## 3) License type
**Not explicitly shown by name in the captured page text** (only a generic “View license” label is visible).

**What the GitHub repo page shows (verbatim quote):**
- “License
View license” (https://github.com/python/cpython)

**Attempt to verify via LICENSE file page:** The visited LICENSE file URL did not load the license text in the captured content; it only shows the repo header area and an error banner. From https://github.com/python/cpython/blob/main/LICENSE:
- “Uh oh!
There was an error while loading.
Please reload this page” (https://github.com/python/cpython/blob/main/LICENSE)

**Conclusion:** Based on the directly visited pages’ captured text, the license *type/name* cannot be extracted (the repo page only says “View license,” and the LICENSE file text did not render in the capture).

## 4) Brief description of what the repository is
**“The Python programming language”** (CPython’s source repository)

**Evidence (verbatim quote):** The “About”/header description on the repo page (https://github.com/python/cpython) states:
- “The Python programming language” (https://github.com/python/cpython)

**Additional context from the repo page (verbatim quote):** The README content visible in the page capture begins with:
- “This is Python version 3.15.0 alpha 6” (https://github.com/python/cpython)

This supports that the repository contains the source for Python (CPython).
final_output.action_summary: Extracted from direct visits to https://github.com/python/cpython (and the LICENSE URL): Primary language is Python ("Python 62.1%"), stars are ~71.8k ("71.8k stars"), description is "The Python programming language". License type/name could not be determined from the captured GitHub page text because it only shows "License – View license" and the LICENSE file page content failed to load ("Uh oh! There was an error while loading").
